features.name: UserPromptSubmit hook
features.description: Runs a shell command before each user prompt is submitted

features.name: PreCompact hook
features.description: Runs before context compaction — used for continuity dumps

features.name: PostToolUse hook
features.description: Runs after every tool call completes

features.name: Stop hook
features.description: Runs when Claude stops (end of turn or session end)

features.name: MCP server declaration in settings.json
features.description: mcpServers key in ~/.claude/settings.json wires up MCP tools

features.name: MCP tool invocation in agent tools list
features.description: Agent tools: field may list MCP-provided tool names

features.name: context7 MCP server
features.description: Provides live library documentation lookup via MCP

features.name: deepwiki MCP server
features.description: AI-powered documentation for GitHub repositories via MCP

features.name: Plan mode activation
features.description: Claude plans before acting when triggered by /plan or --plan flag

features.name: Task/Agent sub-agent spawning
features.description: Commands can spawn subagents via the Agent tool with bounded scope

features.name: model: opus for reasoning-heavy agents
features.description: Agent frontmatter model: field selects the underlying model

features.name: model: haiku for lightweight agents
features.description: Haiku is optimal for lint/verify/check agents (cost + speed)

features.name: argument-hint frontmatter key
features.description: Commands and skills declare argument-hint for /guide discoverability

features.name: SKILL.md format
features.description: Skills live at skills/<name>/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter

features.name: settings.json hook configuration
features.description: Hooks declared under hooks: key in ~/.claude/settings.json

features.name: settings.json MCP server wiring
features.description: mcpServers declared in ~/.claude/settings.json

features.name: CLAUDE.md.template PostToolUse example
features.description: Template should show PostToolUse hook usage for new users

features.name: Bash tool in agent tools list
features.description: Agent must declare Bash in tools: to run shell commands

features.name: WebSearch/WebFetch in agent tools list
features.description: Agent must declare WebSearch or WebFetch to do web lookups

features.name: Context window usage monitoring
features.description: context_estimator tracks percent_used; >0.75 on sonnet → consider opus

features.name: Glob tool for file search
features.description: Glob is the preferred tool for finding files by pattern

features.name: Grep tool for text search
features.description: Grep searches file contents without reading entire files

features.name: $ARGUMENTS placeholder in command body
features.description: User-provided text is injected at $ARGUMENTS in the command body

features.name: Orchestration phase structure in commands
features.description: Multi-phase commands with parallel sub-agent spawning

features.name: tools: field restricts agent capabilities
features.description: Agent tools: list is the security + capability boundary for subagents
